productDisplayName: John Miller Men Striped Blue Shirt
description: Composition Blue striped shirt made of blended fabric, has a spread collar, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a pocket on the left chest Fit Slim Wash care Machine wash inside-out separately in warm water Do not bleach Tumble dry low Dry inside out in shade Warm iron Designed for the ambitious executive in a flattering shade and crafted from cotton/polyester blended fabric, this formal shirt from the john miller collection is stitched to perfection.
